SPAT!

Dark Phonics · Week 4 (p) · decodable reader · hidden potato cameo finale
Page 1

Sat.

Cat enthroned on the sap stump; Sam approaches
Page 2

Sap. Sap. Sap.

Drip… drip… drip… on the oblivious cat
Page 3

Sap! Sat! Sat!

Stuck fast — the cat has sat in it
Page 4

Pat, pat, pat.

Sam pats; now Sam is stuck too
Page 5

Tap, tap, tap.

One finger. The cat's fur rises
Page 6

Pat? Pat? Tap?

Hushed page — the finger hovers
Page 7

SPAT!

The eruption
Page 8

Sat! Sap! Tap!

The aftermath chant — smug cat wins
Page 9

(wordless — find the potato!)

Sam lifts up — Teacher Potato was under him all along
